title: Agent-Foundry Skill Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for a skill. Derived from YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md, extended with operational metadata (cost, time, execution type).

id.description: Unique slug. Lowercase, hyphenated. Used as the registry key.

name.description: Human-readable skill name. Same as SKILL.md frontmatter.

description.description: Trigger phrase + use-case description. Drives auto-trigger matching.

author.description: Author of this skill. Required for catalog-wide attestation.

category.description: Whether this skill is always-on (core) or opt-in (optional).

execution_type.description: How the skill is executed. For v0.1, everything is 'prompt' (hand body + context to LLM).

trigger_patterns.description: Regex patterns that auto-trigger this skill. Derived from description's 'Use when' clause.

estimated_time_seconds.description: Wall-clock estimate for one execution. P50 based on historical runs.
